title: Daily quest pool (v5)
description: A pool of rotating daily kill quests. Each pool file holds several quest variants that share a single daily rotation slot; exactly one variant is active per game day, and the active variant advances by one position every time the WorldClock transitions from NIGHT back to DAY (see DailyQuestService / DailyQuestRotationTicker). Players accept the active variant with DAILY_QUEST ACCEPT <pool_id>, track kill progress through the day, and claim a bonus gold/XP reward with DAILY_QUEST COMPLETE. Schema versions 1-4 describe single normal contracts (kill, item delivery, NPC delivery, exploration); this version 5 describes a daily rotation pool. Pool files live under data/quests/daily/<name>.json and the loader tolerates unknown properties (AGENTS.md §11).

type.description: Optional human-readable discriminator. Daily quest variants are otherwise ordinary kill quests.

pool_id.description: Unique pool id, accepted via DAILY_QUEST ACCEPT <pool_id>. Becomes the daily_pool_id of every variant in the pool.

quests.description: The ordered list of quest variants that rotate through this pool, one active per game day.

id.description: Unique quest id, unique across all daily pools.

name.description: Display name shown to the player.

description.description: Short flavour description of the quest goal.

target_mob_id.description: Mob template id that must be killed to progress.

required_kills.description: Number of kills needed to complete the quest.

title_reward.description: Optional title granted to the player on completion.

item_reward.description: Optional item id granted directly to the player's inventory on completion. Must exist under data/items/. Copies that would exceed the player's carry weight drop at their feet in the current room.

item_reward_quantity.description: Number of copies of item_reward to grant. Defaults to 1 when item_reward is present and this field is omitted; must be omitted (or 0) when item_reward is absent.

quests.name: Daily Slayer: Rats
quests.description: The keep needs its daily cull of vermin. Slay rats.

quests.name: Daily Slayer: Goblins
quests.description: Goblin raiders press the borders today. Cut them down.
